events.title: Access Tech Forum

events.title: Completed: Jazz Garden Social
events.description: A completed event with seeded real closeout data for testing Closeout Report labels, downloads, attendance metrics, and report state.

events.title: Completed: Volunteer Appreciation Night
events.description: A completed event without a seeded closeout report so hosts can test the Report Preview fallback and download pill behavior.
